name: Tasty Pasta and Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup green peas, frozen and thawed
1 can solid white tuna in water, drain and flake (7-1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water without salt.
2. Rinse the cooked pasta under cold water.
3. Place the pasta in a bowl of cold water to stop cooking when it is cold.
4. Drain the pasta well.
5. Combine the pasta and next 5 ingredients in a bowl; toss gently.
6. Add dressing and toss well.
Makes 4 servings (about 190 calories per 1 1/2 cup serving and 1.7g fat).
